---
title: "Talis Instructional Self-Efficacy"
output: word_document
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# load library and dataset
```{r}
# libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(jtools)
library(gtsummary)
library(mice)
library(labelled)
library(interactions)
#data
df_all <- haven::read_dta("ttgintt4.dta")
```

```{r}
# replace missing values with R na to match the current missing values in Stata
df <-  tagged_na_to_regular_na(df_all) 

# make variable names lowercase
colnames(df) <- tolower(colnames(df))

# subset data for mathematics and drop unused levels
df <- df %>% filter(tt4g48a == 2)  %>% droplevels() 

```

# Subset Data
```{r}
df_summ <- df %>% as_factor() %>% filter(tt4g48a== "Mathematics") %>% dplyr::select(idschool, idteach, t4seins, t4self, t4secls, cntry, tt4g49, tt4g07a, tt4g07b, tt4g04, t4tagegr, tt4g21a, tt4g21b, tt4g24a, tt4g24b, starts_with("t4tyexp"), starts_with("trwgt")) %>%  mutate(instruct_eff = as.numeric(t4seins))
                                                                                    
# drop missing outcomes
df_summ <- df_summ %>% filter(!is.na(t4seins)) # only 50 missing

# combine not at all and to some extent
df_summ <- df_summ %>% mutate(content_prep = fct_collapse(tt4g07a, "Not at all / To some extent" = c("Not at all", "To some extent")),
                              pedagogy_prep = fct_collapse(tt4g07b,"Not at all / To some extent" = c("Not at all", "To some extent")))

df_summ <- df_summ %>% mutate(content_prep = fct_collapse(tt4g07a, "Not at all / To some extent" = c("Not at all", "To some extent")),
                              pedagogy_prep = fct_collapse(tt4g07b,"Not at all / To some extent" = c("Not at all", "To some extent")))
```

# Descriptive Statistics
```{r}
df_summ %>% dplyr::select(t4seins, content_prep, pedagogy_prep, tt4g24a, tt4g24b, t4tyexptt, t4tagegr, tt4g49, tt4g21a, tt4g21b, tt4g04) %>% tbl_summary(statistic = all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})") %>% as_flex_table()
```
# Preliminary Analysis
```{r}
library(lmerTest)
library(lme4)
library(jtools)
library(gtsummary)


df_factor <- df_summ %>% as_factor()

# Two Level Model by Country - Instructional Self-Efficacy as Outcome

mlm1 <- lmer(t4seins ~ 
               content_prep * pedagogy_prep + # content and pedagogy interaction
               tt4g24a + tt4g24b + # need for PD
              (4-tt4g49) + # reverse coded for if math included in formal training
               tt4g21a + tt4g21b + # type of PD experiencing
               t4tyexptt + t4tagegr + tt4g04 +  # controls
               (1 | cntry), # using conuntry for robust standard error
             data = df_factor
)

tbl_regression(mlm1) %>%
  add_significance_stars() %>% 
  as_flex_table()
```


# Multiple Imputation

```{r eval = FALSE}
#subset data
df_subset <- df_factor %>% select(idschool, idteach, cntry, t4seins, content_prep, pedagogy_prep, tt4g24a, tt4g24b, t4tyexptt, t4tagegr, tt4g49, tt4g21a, tt4g21b, tt4g04)
start_time <- Sys.time()
df_imputed <- mice(df_subset, m = 20)
end_time <- Sys.time()
end_time - start_time
save(df_imputed, file = "df_imputed.rdata")
```

```{r}
# load libraries
library(lmerTest)
library(lme4)
library(jtools)
library(gtsummary)

# load imputed data

# Two Level Model by Country - Instructional Self-Efficacy as Outcome

mlm1_imp <- with(df_imputed, lmer(t4seins ~ 
               content_prep * pedagogy_prep + # content and pedagogy interaction
               tt4g24a + tt4g24b + # need for PD
              (4-tt4g49) + # reverse coded for if math included in formal training
               tt4g21a + tt4g21b + # type of PD experiencing
               t4tyexptt + t4tagegr + tt4g04 +  # controls
               (1 | cntry))) # using country for robust standard error

tbl_regression(mlm1_imp) %>%
  add_significance_stars() %>% 
  as_flex_table()
```


# Single Level Linear Regression
```{r eval = FALSE}
library(survey)
df_svy <- svydesign(data = df_summ, id =~cntry + idschool, probs = NULL, fpc = NULL, variables = NULL, repweights = "trwgt[1-100]+", type = "BRR")
m_svy <- svyglm(design = df_svy, t4seins ~ content_prep*pedagogy_prep + t4tagegr + tt4g04 + tt4g21a*tt4g21b, family = gaussian())
m_svy %>% tbl_regression() %>% add_significance_stars(hide_p = FALSE, hide_ci = FALSE) %>% as_flex_table()
```

# Instructional Self-Efficacy WITH WEIGHTS
```{r eval = FALSE}
df_svy_imp <- svydesign(data = complete(df_imputed), id =~cntry + idschool, probs = NULL, fpc = NULL, variables = NULL, repweights = "trwgt[1-100]+", type = "BRR")
imp_svy <- svyglm(design = df_svy, t4seins ~ content_prep*pedagogy_prep + t4tagegr + tt4g04 + tt4g21a*tt4g21b, family = gaussian())
imp_svy %>% tbl_regression() %>% add_significance_stars(hide_p = FALSE, hide_ci = FALSE) %>% as_flex_table()
```
